/usr/bin/cc -flto -Wl,--gc-sections CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/nsurl/nsurl.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/nsurl/parse.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/idna.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/punycode.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/hashtable.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/corestrings.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/http/generics.c.o "CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/http/content-type.c.o" CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/http/primitives.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/messages.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/utils/http/parameter.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/__/content/mimesniff.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/log.c.o CMakeFiles/mimesniff.dir/mimesniff.c.o -o mimesniff  -Wl,-rpath,/app/build/contrib/libcss:/app/build/contrib/libnsgif:/app/build/contrib/libnsbmp:/app/build/contrib/libsvgtiny:/app/build/contrib/quickjs-ng:/app/build/contrib/libdom:/app/build/contrib/libhubbub:/app/build/contrib/libparserutils:/app/build/contrib/libnsutils ../../contrib/libcss/libcss.so.1 ../../contrib/libnsgif/libnsgif.so.1 ../../contrib/libnsbmp/libnsbmp.so.1 ../../contrib/libsvgtiny/libsvgtiny.so.1 -lcrypto -lpng16 -lcurl -ljpeg -lwebp -lavif -lpsl -lz -lssl -lutf8proc ../../contrib/quickjs-ng/libqjs.so.0.11.0 -lcheck_pic -lrt -lm -lsubunit ../../contrib/libdom/libdom.so.1 ../../contrib/libhubbub/libhubbub.so.1 ../../contrib/libparserutils/libparserutils.so.1 -lxml2 ../../contrib/libnsutils/libnsutils.so.1 -ldl -lm
